record.field: Column "%(column)s" does not exist importing data with importer "%(importer)s".
Name "%(name)s" is not valid for column "%(column)s" in importer "%(importer)s".
No records where imported using importer "%(importer)s".
There must be one and only one party with "%(party)s".
There must be one and only one product with "%(product)s".
Product category "%(category)s" not found.
Changing the format on importer "%(name)s" may cause your settings to be lost. Are you sure to proceed?
Account %(account)s not found.
No period for date "%(date)s".
Account "%(account)s" requires a party but no party was supplied in move "%(move)s".
Invoice type must be 'out' or 'in' but "%(type)s" was found.
Animal %(animal)s not found.
Farm %(farm)s not found.
Location %(location)s not found.
Party "%(party)s" not found.
Coud not create move, could not find some info: from_location:"%(from_location)s", to_location:"%(to_location)s", product: "%(product)s."
Could not find this value in the field selection "%(field)%"
Wrong Iban %(iban)s.
Bank not found for iban: %(iban)s.
Agent not found for Agent %(agent)s and plan %(plan)s.
Company %(company)s not found.
Order point not fount a value for Warehouse: %(warehouse)s or Product %(product)s .
Type %(type_)s not supported for orderpoint.
